case_title: SAPUNAR, NICHOLAS, TRUSTEE OF vs. DOE I, JANE et al

docket_entries.description: MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAPUNAR, NICHOLAS, TRUSTEE OF THE SAPUNAR FAMILY TRUST COURT TRIAL SET FOR MAY-01-2000 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 218 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT IN DEPT 218, LNORRIS, JUDGE; FHENTON, CLERK; NIKEUYE, CSR. PLNTF APPR BY JSACRAMENTO, ESQ. DEF ELIZABETH WYATT, USED AS DOE 1, APPR IN PRO PER. PARTIES STIPULATE TO ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FOR PLNTF AND AGAINST DEF FOR POSSESSION OF PREMISES AT 435 WARREN DRIVE #1, SAN FRANCISCO CA, STAYED TO 15 MAY 2000 WITH ADDITIONAL STAY TO 31 MAY 2000 AVAILABLE UPON PAYMENT OF $721.35 TO PLNTF. IF TIMELY VACATED, PLNTF AGREES TO DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE AND WAIVE BACK RENT. UPON FAILURE TO TIMELY VACATE, PLNTF MAY APPLY EX PARTE FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT WITH AWARD OF DAMAGES AND ATTORNEY FEES.
